name: Moktar Firestarter
oracle_text: Whenever an artifact you control is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, ~ deals 2 damage to each opponent.
flavor_text: "Fire was the first technology. It will also be the last."
design_notes: A 2/1 for 1R is clean red stats (P+T = CMC+1). The triggered ability rewards artifact sacrifice or destruction strategies, connecting to red's artifact-matters themes and the set's relic/salvage flavor. Works well with Spark Detonator and artifact tokens from other colors. The trigger is narrower than 'whenever an artifact enters' since it requires artifacts leaving, making it a natural pairing with sacrifice outlets or fragile relics. Deals damage to opponents only, staying in red's wheelhouse.
